options.title: Signals in the fog
options.creative_concept: Observe changing lights before counting them.
options.hook: A signal disappears before the class can count it.
options.viewer_value: The class needs a reliable way to track every light.
options.course_anchor: Count visible objects once without omission.
options.classroom_first_question: How can we count every light exactly once?
options.handoff_moment: Stop when all lights become visible together.
must_not_preteach: Do not state the counting method.
options.fit_reason: The observation creates a concrete counting need.
risks: Keep the number of lights within five.
